tasks.subject: Add inbox scaffolding to library template
tasks.notes: Use 'git add -f templates/library/inbox/.gitkeep' — the /inbox/ pattern in templates/library/.gitignore causes git to ignore it otherwise. Pattern must be /inbox/ (leading slash) not inbox/ to avoid matching nested inbox/ dirs at any depth.
tasks.verifyCommand: git ls-files --error-unmatch templates/library/inbox/.gitkeep 2>/dev/null && grep -q '/inbox/' templates/library/.gitignore && echo OK

tasks.subject: Write skills/process-inbox/SKILL.md
tasks.verifyCommand: test -f skills/process-inbox/SKILL.md && grep -q 'name: process-inbox' skills/process-inbox/SKILL.md && grep -q 'Use when' skills/process-inbox/SKILL.md && grep -q 'SKILL_NAME="stacks:process-inbox"' skills/process-inbox/SKILL.md && echo OK

tasks.subject: Version bump to 0.8.0, CHANGELOG entry, commit and push
tasks.notes: marketplace.json plugins[0].version is currently 0.6.0 — bump to 0.8.0, not 0.7.0. Both files must land on 0.8.0. CHANGELOG format: '## 0.8.0 — YYYY-MM-DD' followed by blank line then bullet entries with 'feat(scope):' prefix. After commit, run 'git push' — push is the activation step for directory-source plugins.
tasks.verifyCommand: jq -r .version .claude-plugin/plugin.json | grep -q '0.8.0' && jq -r '.plugins[0].version' .claude-plugin/marketplace.json | grep -q '0.8.0' && grep -q '0.8.0' CHANGELOG.md && git log --oneline -1 | grep -q '0.8.0' && echo OK
